data.body:
[operator-attested] Local persistent write-signing provisioned on this machine (2026-07-16T21:46:25Z).
- Private key materialized from AWS SSM SecureString /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key (ADR-0012) to ~/.ssh/rebar-bot-signing-key, mode 0600 (ls -l: -rw------- /Users/joeoakhart/.ssh/rebar-bot-signing-key), outside the repo.
- Machine-wide config: ~/.config/rebar/config.toml [identity] signing_key = /Users/joeoakhart/.ssh/rebar-bot-signing-key (XDG user config; wins over project rebar.toml which sets no signing_key, so every worktree/session signs with no per-session setup).
- Identity: 594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d (Rebar Bot), email joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com. Registered pubkey == materialized private key's public half (ssh-keygen -y match, AC2 PASS).
- Verification: fresh probe ticket 4c55-2e0c-d4d8-432c written from this machine shows authorship {signed:1, unsigned:0} and its event VERIFIES (absent from the verify-identity non-verified report). AC1/AC2/AC3/AC4 all PASS.
Runbook: to reprovision on this machine, re-materialize the SSM key to ~/.ssh/rebar-bot-signing-key (0600) and set ~/.config/rebar/config.toml [identity] signing_key to that path.
